chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Crl. Appeal No.S-17 of 2014. Date Order with the signature of Judge For hearing of main case 26.01.2021. Mr. Haji Khan Khoso, Advocate for the appellant Ms. Sobia Bhatti, A.P.G for State. = The perusal of record reveals that the appellant together with absconding accused Muhammad was challaned by the police to face trial for case outcome FIR/crime No.179 of 2010 u/s 302, 34 PPC of PS Shaheed Fazi Rahu. Ali Muhammad being father of deceased Riaz being dissatisfied with the police investigation filed a direct complaint against the appellant and four others. It was brought on record by learned trial Court. Sessions Case No.324 of 2010 outcome of police report and Sessions Case No.353 of 2010 outcome of Direct Complaint proceeded before learned trial Court side by side. On conclusion of trial, learned trial Court by way of single judgment dated 07.12.2013 disposed of both the above said cases, thereby convicted the appellant while acquitted rest of the culprits before it, such judgment was impugned by the appellant before this Court by filing the instant appeal. Neither paper book in case outcome of Direct Complaint is prepared by the office nor complainant Ali Muhammad has been put on notice. Office is directed to prepare the paper book in case of outcome of Direct Complaint against the appellant on cost and issue notice to complainant Ali Muhammad. Adjourned to a date in office. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
